@gnlnvmn   
AI will never automate anything on its own—it always suggests, and you're always in control of what gets created or enabled. That way, you can review and decide what fits your workflow before making any changes.

And yes, the Free plan does have usage limits, including limits on records and active automations. You can find the complete breakdown on our pricing page: Zoho Tables Pricing.   
  
If you have any questions about which plan is right for your use case, feel free to write to support@zohotables.com.

How does the AI handle really large datasets, and does it slow down once you cross a few hundred thousand rows?

Sai Kishore T V

Zoho Tables

Zoho Tables

Maker [...] Promoted

Archanaa

Hunter

📌

Excited to hunt Zoho Tables today. Spreadsheets break the moment work gets collaborative. Real databases need a developer. Zoho Tables sits right in between: describe what you need, Zia builds the base, and the same data flows into Grid, Calendar, Gallery, Gantt, Form, and Kanban with zero exports. A few highlights to look out for: automations that kill the busywork, reports that stay current on their own, and a mobile app that spins up a base by voice with Siri and lets you annotate images with Apple Pencil. I'll let the makers (the engineering, design, and product team) share what they set out to solve and how it came together. Give it a try and let them know what you think.

Volkovinskaya Veronika
Joseph McWhirter [...] I have been using Zoho Cliq and Zoho People for some time now, and I must say that they have been effective tools for managing my team's performance and KRA. With these tools, I am able to set goals and track the progress of my team members, which has helped us to stay on track and achieve our objectives. The performance tracking feature in Zoho People is particularly useful, as it allows me to monitor individual and team performance, and identify areas where improvement is needed.  
  
Overall, I would highly recommend Zoho Cliq and Zoho People to other managers and teams looking for an effective performance management and KRA tracking tool. While it may have some limitations in terms of time tracking, it more than makes up for it with its strong features in other areas.

## Online Project Management Software & Tools

5.0•2 reviews•

91 followers

Visit website

Project management software

•

Team collaboration software

•

Issue tracking software

Zoho Projects is an online project management tool that helps teams collaborate effectively and complete projects on time. One of its core capabilities is issue tracking, which allows teams to quickly identify, prioritise, and resolve problems that arise during the project lifecycle. Users can easily create and assign issues, set due dates, and track progress in real time. The tool also provides detailed analytics to help team leaders identify bottlenecks and take corrective actions.
